tasks.title: Sect-motion web read contract scaffolding (list/detail, no UI actions)
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: add/align web typed contract/client scaffolding for existing sect-motion read APIs GET /registrar/sect-motion/entries and GET /registrar/sect-motion/:entryId. Scope: endpoint helper mapping, typed client methods, focused web tests; no new user-facing actions or CTAs. Update docs/specs/system/registrar.md implemented-now wording if needed, docs/CHANGELOG.md, and dated docs/handoff with exact command outputs.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web test -- registrar-contract-inventory.test.ts registrar-client.test.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck
